hero.headline: Reveal Your Natural Beauty with C Beauty
hero.subheadline: Premium skincare, beauty treatments, and expert consultations designed for healthy, radiant skin.

about.title: About C Beauty
about.story: C Beauty was founded with a passion for helping every woman reveal her most radiant, confident self. We combine cutting-edge skincare science with natural ingredients to deliver real, visible results.
about.mission: Our mission is to make premium skincare accessible, educational, and effective — empowering women across Sudan and the GCC to love the skin they're in.

products.name: Glow Cleansing Foam
products.description: Gentle daily cleanser for all skin types

products.name: Lumina Brightening Cream
products.description: Even skin tone and reduce dark spots

services.name: Skin Analysis
services.description: Advanced skin assessment using latest technology to identify your skin type and concerns.
services.benefits: Personalized results · 30 min session · Expert report

services.name: Facial Treatments
services.description: Customized facials targeting hydration, brightening, and rejuvenation.

services.name: Acne Treatment
services.description: Medical-grade acne solutions combining topical and professional treatments.
services.benefits: Clear skin · Reduce scarring · Prevent breakouts

services.name: Pigmentation Treatment
services.description: Target dark spots, melasma and uneven skin tone with proven protocols.
services.benefits: Even tone · Fade spots · Brighter skin

services.name: Anti-Aging Programs
services.description: Comprehensive programs to reduce fine lines and restore youthful radiance.
services.benefits: Firmer skin · Reduce wrinkles · Collagen boost

services.name: Skin Brightening
services.description: Brighten dull skin with our signature C Beauty glow protocol.

services.name: Beauty Consultations
services.description: One-on-one sessions with our certified beauty experts.

services.name: Hair Care Consultations
services.description: Professional hair and scalp analysis with treatment recommendations.
services.benefits: Healthier hair · Scalp care · Growth tips

services.name: Personalized Skincare Plans
services.description: Custom 30/60/90-day skincare plans tailored to your goals.
services.benefits: Step-by-step plan · Product guide · Progress tracking

services.name: Online Consultation
services.description: Expert skincare consultations from the comfort of your home via video call.

testimonials.name: Sara Al-Rashid
testimonials.text: C Beauty completely transformed my skin! My acne is gone and I finally feel confident without makeup.

testimonials.name: Nour Hassan
testimonials.text: The online consultation was so convenient and professional. The personalized plan worked wonders!

testimonials.name: Lina Mohammed
testimonials.text: Best skincare brand I've ever tried. The Vitamin C serum changed my skin in just 2 weeks!

testimonials.name: Fatima Al-Zahra
testimonials.text: Amazing products and incredible customer service. Highly recommend C Beauty to everyone!

testimonials.name: Rana Khalid
testimonials.text: The anti-aging program gave me visible results in 30 days. I look 10 years younger!

testimonials.name: Maya Ibrahim
testimonials.text: Professional, caring and results-driven. C Beauty is truly the best in Sudan!
